steps.title: Identify the sequence structure
steps.content: The passage describes a causal chain using explicit sequential markers: “First” signals the opening step, and “Finally” signals the closing step. The blank falls between these, requiring a transition word that advances the sequence.

steps.title: Select the sequential transition
steps.content: ”Next,” advances from step 1 to step 2, matching the sequential structure. “Similarly” treats steps as parallel, “On the contrary” introduces contrast, and “First of all” redundantly repeats the initial “First.” The sequence requires a forward-moving transition to connect the opening step to the final result. That matches choice D — D is correct.
